mapper.sql: id, name, description, category_id, main_image, images, min_price, status, is_hot, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND is_hot = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT FROM product WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, description, category_id, main_image, images, min_price, status, is_hot) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{mainImage}, #{images}, #{minPrice}, #{status}, #{isHot})
mapper.update:
UPDATE product
name = #{name}, description = #{description}, category_id = #{categoryId}, main_image = #{mainImage}, images = #{images}, min_price = #{minPrice}, status = #{status}, is_hot = #{isHot},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE product SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
